notes.total: 131 tickets scoped across 9 sprints is a healthy workload, averaging 1.4 tickets closed per day throughout the quarter.
notes.completed: 129 of 131 tickets completed (98%) represents excellent delivery performance with only 2 items remaining in progress.
notes.completion_rate: 98% completion rate demonstrates strong execution and realistic sprint planning throughout the quarter.
notes.releases_shipped: 10 releases shipped across 9 sprints indicates a healthy, consistent release cadence with most sprints delivering production updates.
notes.oos_total: Zero out-of-sprint tickets added shows exceptional sprint discipline and planning accuracy.
notes.oos_open: No open out-of-sprint items — target achieved with zero unplanned debt carried forward.
notes.type_split: 22% bugs (29 of 131 tickets) is within healthy range, with Stories dominating at 70% indicating strong feature development focus.
notes.avg_releases: Median of 2 releases per sprint shows most sprints shipped multiple releases; mean of 1.1 indicates some sprints had fewer releases but overall cadence remained strong.
notes.time_logged: Only 1 hour logged against 2,041 estimated hours indicates a critical time-tracking gap — actual effort data is effectively unavailable for capacity planning.
notes.estimate_accuracy: Estimate accuracy cannot be calculated due to missing time logs; 7% of tickets had no estimates which is acceptable, but lack of actuals prevents any variance analysis.
notes.no_estimate: 9 tickets (7%) completed without estimates is excellent planning hygiene, though the value is undermined by absence of time logging.
notes.rollover: Only 3 tickets (2%) rolled over between sprints demonstrates strong sprint commitment and minimal scope bleed.
notes.cycle_time: Median cycle time of 7 days shows most tickets flow through quickly; mean of 10.6 days indicates a few longer-running items but overall delivery pace is solid.
notes.assignee_workload: Workload well-balanced across 4 team members (34%, 31%, 23%, 11%) with all achieving 98-100% completion rates; 1 unassigned ticket remains incomplete.
